posts.author: amirh (Amir)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

I realized there is a problem when using more than one form in a specific board. The problem appears in views where the Group by function is on. So when you have enabled the item creation via forms, created two kind of forms, when the group by function is on the system allows you to create items only via the first form you created and it disables the ability to choose one of these two forms that were created.

What are you trying to achieve

To prevent the function group by from disrupting the ability to choose between two or more Forms for item creation in a specific board.
